mapper.insert:
insert into match_statistics (fixture_id, team_id, shots_total, shots_on_target, possession, fouls, corners, yellow_cards, red_cards, offsides, created_at) values
(#{s.fixtureId}, #{s.teamId}, #{s.shotsTotal}, #{s.shotsOnTarget}, #{s.possession}, #{s.fouls}, #{s.corners}, #{s.yellowCards}, #{s.redCards}, #{s.offsides}, now())
